content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 26, 2026, focused on enhancing the Automations and LifeOps frameworks, improving native desktop application support, and refining trigger-event handling. Key updates include multi-stage workflow progress tracking, improved UX for n8n workflow generation, and critical bug fixes for event routing and state management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Automations & Workflow Enhancements**
    *   Introduced a 6-stage progress card for workflow generation to improve user feedback ([#7127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7127)).
    *   Added planner-side disambiguation to distinguish between user prompts for n8n workflows ([#7120](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7120)).
    *   Resolved multiple bugs, including stale-id validation issues, chat dock visibility, and orphaned chat room cleanup after workflow deletion ([#7128](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7128), [#7125](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7125), [#7121](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7121)).
*   **Trigger & Event System Hardening**
    *   Implemented `TriggerEventBridge` to route event-kind triggers (Discord, Telegram, Webhooks) to the handler pipeline ([#7116](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7116)).
    *   Fixed routing issues for `CREATE_TRIGGER_TASK` and ensured Telegram messages correctly emit `MESSAGE_RECEIVED` events ([#7124](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7124), [#7122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7122), [#7119](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7119)).
    *   Increased streaming generation timeout from 90s to 180s to accommodate complex LLM workloads ([#7117](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7117)).
*   **Native Application & Infrastructure**
    *   Enabled native window support for apps and added an App Details page ([#7115](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7115)).
    *   Integrated Signal CLI auto-installation and updated various dependencies, including Vite, Vitest, and Rust-based service runtimes ([#7107](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7107), [#7131](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7131), [#7130](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7130)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7132](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7132): Fixes LifeOps schedule persistence and splash asset paths.
*   [#7114](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7114): Implements native window support for apps and the App Details page.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Repository Integration**
    *   [#7108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7108): Tracking issue for the integration of 29 commits from the `shaw/checkpoint-20260426-eliza` branch into `develop`.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported for this date.*
